_comment: shadcn/ui v4 rules. Loaded when shadcn is detected (via components.json).

rules.message: shadcn v4 requires cssVariables: true for theme integration.
Missing cursor-pointer base styles. Add @layer base { a, button, [role='button'] { cursor: pointer; } } to globals.css so all interactive elements are clickable without per-instance classes.
Hardcoded color in Tailwind class. Use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground) for theme support.
